columns.name: AccountDisplayName
columns.description: Name of the account user displayed in the address book

columns.name: AccountDomain
columns.description: Domain of the account

columns.name: AccountName
columns.description: User name of the account

columns.name: AccountObjectId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the account in Azure AD

columns.name: AccountSid
columns.description: Security Identifier (SID) of the account

columns.name: AccountUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account

columns.name: ActionType
columns.description: Type of activity that triggered the event

columns.name: AdditionalFields
columns.description: Additional information about the entity or event

columns.name: Application
columns.description: Application that performed the recorded action

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: DestinationDeviceName
columns.description: Name of the device running the server application that processed the recorded action

columns.name: DestinationIPAddress
columns.description: IP address of the device running the server application that processed the recorded action

columns.name: DestinationPort
columns.description: Destination port of related network communications

columns.name: DeviceName
columns.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the device

columns.name: DeviceType
columns.description: Type of device

columns.name: FailureReason
columns.description: Information explaining why the recorded action failed

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.description: IP address assigned to the endpoint and used during related network communications

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: ISP
columns.description: Internet service provider (ISP) associated with the endpoint IP address

columns.name: LastSeenForUser
columns.description: Number of days since each statistical feature for the user was last seen

columns.name: Location
columns.description: City, country, or other geographic location associated with the event

columns.name: LogonType
columns.description: Type of logon session

columns.name: OSPlatform
columns.description: Platform of the operating system running on the machine

columns.name: Port
columns.description: TCP port used during communication

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: Network protocol used

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TargetAccountDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the account that the recorded action was applied to

columns.name: TargetDeviceName
columns.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the device that the recorded action was applied to

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Date and time (UTC) when the record was generated

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UncommonForUser
columns.description: List of features observed to be statistically uncommon for the user that performed the activity

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the event was recorded

columns.name: Isp
columns.description: Internet service provider (ISP) associated with the endpoint IP address
